description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND there are no games on the schedule

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates to the Games page
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "On the Games page, Today's Games <today's_date>, zero games, Date Navigation, Left Button, press select to navigate to the previous day. <x> of <y> buttons in the navigation, press up for the Main Menu."
